name: Bolna.ai
description: Bolna.ai — Open-source voice agent framework for building multilingual telephone AI assistants with telephony integration.

seo.title: Bolna.ai — AI API / SDK for Developers
seo.meta_description: Bolna.ai: Bolna.ai — Open-source voice agent framework for building multilingual telephone AI assistants with telephony integration.

when_to_use: Building multilingual telephone AI assistants with open-source stack
Integrating voice agents with Twilio or SIP telephony systems
Running automated outbound call campaigns with AI voice
Prototyping conversational IVR replacements for SMBs

pros: Multilingual telephony out of the box
cons: Latency depends on underlying LLM choice
Community smaller than Vapi or Retell
review.verdict: The pragmatic OSS alternative when Vapi and Retell feel too closed or expensive.
review.best_for: Teams building phone agents who want code ownership and multilingual reach
review.not_for: Non-technical teams that need a turnkey hosted voice agent
